title: dryopteris × boottii f. multiflora
intro: Dryopteris × boottii f. multiflora, also known as the multiflora autumn fern, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Dryopteris genus and is commonly found in woodland areas. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The multiflora autumn fern is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made by combining the plant's leaves with hot water or a solvent to extract its active compounds.
